caption: The video captures a scene of a person performing on stage, likely singing or speaking into a microphone. The performer is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs and a red necklace. They are holding a guitar, suggesting they might be playing music as part of their performance. The audience, seated in front of the stage, appears engaged, with some individuals turning their heads slightly, possibly to get a better view or listen more closely. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the event may be associated with this organization.
